title: First white hairs — Feb 8 2020 stress reflection
html:
48-second voice memo from Feb 8 2020 — Yahir notices a few white hairs in his beard for the first time, recalling Tio Antonio explaining that white hairs meant stress / "shit not going right." Three weeks before Dad leaves to Mazatlán — sits in the prelude to the family rupture and the alcoholism in the family thread.

grants pass teen era · alcoholism in the family · mom yahir · react not what happens · numbness as strength

related.label: It Doesn't Matter What Happens, It Matters How You React
